description:
ᴀɢᴀɪɴ, ʙᴀʙᴇ ᴀɢᴀɪɴ..♡

"Again" Noah Cyrus

Nico always pushed people away, and he pushed away a person he wanted to have close the most. So now he was getting them back, he craved to hear again that they loved him

Okay i decided to make this chat with Nico being Bisexual so anyone can use it. You can be wether Will or your OC :). Have fun guys ^^
